chooseLanguageSubtitle: Choose your preferred language to start your journey.

welcome.description:
Smart weight management and AI
nutrition tracking tailored just for 
you.
welcome.terms: By continuing, you agree to our Terms & Privacy Policy.

signup.title: Start your journey
signup.subtitle: Create an account to track your nutrition
signup.email_invalid_error: Please enter a valid email address
signup.password_len_error: Password must be at least 8 characters long
signup.password_uppercase_error: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
signup.password_lowercase_error: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
signup.password_number_error: Password must contain at least one number
signup.password_special_error: Password must contain at least one special character/symbol
signup.agree: I agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy

login.subtitle: Log in to continue your wellness journey

forgot.title: Forgot Password
forgot.subtitle: Don't worry! Enter your registered email or phone number below to receive a password reset code.

validation.required: Please enter your email or phone number
validation.invalid: Enter a valid email or phone number

otp.sent_to: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to
otp.by_continuing:
By continuing, you agree to our Terms of
Service and Privacy Policy.

reset.title: Reset Password
reset.description: Your new password must be different from previously used passwords.

goal.title: Choose Your Goal
goal.subtitle: We'll tailor your nutrition plan and daily habits based on this choice.
goal.weight_loss_desc: Shed pounds sustainably with a caloric deficit and balanced macros.
goal.maintenance_desc: Keep your current weight while improving metabolic health and energy.
goal.muscle_gain_desc: Build strength and lean mass with high-protein targets and hypertrophy.

onboarding.description: Snap a photo of your meal, and our AI will automatically identify and track your nutrients.

ai_coach.description: Get real-time feedback, meal suggestions, and answers to your health questions 24/7.

insights.title: Track Your Trends
insights.description: Visualize your progress over time with detailed analytics on your nutrition, weight, and habits.

permission.title: Unlock Your Potential
permission.subtitle: To personalize your coaching and automate tracking, we need access to a few capabilities on your device.
permission.camera_description: Required to snap photos of your meals for instant AI calorie and macro logging.
permission.notifications_description: Get timely reminders for hydration, meal logging, and daily motivation.
permission.health_description: Sync steps and workouts from Apple Health to adjust your daily calorie goals automatically.
permission.disable_info: To disable permissions, please open the device settings.

premium.title: Unlock Your Full Potential
premium.subtitle: Get the AI advantage. Accelerate your weight loss with advanced nutrition tracking and human coaching.
premium.footer: Cancel anytime. Your subscription automatically renews until you cancel in your app settings.
premium.terms: Cancel anytime. Your subscription automatically renews until you cancel in your app settings.

medical.title: Your Medical Conditions
medical.subtitle: Select any medical conditions that apply to you to get personalized nutrition recommendations
medical.anemia_desc: Low red blood cells or iron deficiency

activity.title: Activity Level
activity.subtitle: Select your daily physical activity level to calculate your energy needs accurately.
activity.sedentary_desc: Little or no exercise, desk job
activity.lightly_active_desc: Light exercise or sports 1-3 days a week
activity.moderately_active_desc: Moderate exercise or sports 3-5 days a week
activity.very_active_desc: Hard exercise or sports 6-7 days a week

diet.title: Dietary Preferences
diet.subtitle: Select your dietary preferences to get tailored meal recommendations
diet.glp1_desc: I'm currently using GLP-1 medications for weight management

home.coach_tip: Drink more water! You've consumed only 4 glasses so far. Aim for 8-10 glasses daily to stay hydrated.

calibrate.title: Calibrate Scale
calibrate.description_end: next to your plate for better portion estimation.

profile.title: Profile
profile.sign_out_confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
